mapper.select: SELECT mapping.OBJECT_NO , mapping.OBJECT_NM , mapping.BUSINESS_AREA_CD , mapping.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD , mapping.REV_NO , mapping.OBJECT_CLASS_CD2 , mapping.OBJECT_CLASS_NM2 , mapping.PROTECT_YN , mapping.OBJECT_ID , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileViewNm , fileInfo.FILE_SIZE , fileInfo.FILE_NO , fileInfo.FILE_NM , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM , fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM , mapping.DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD AS distributeTypeCd /* 파일유형 */ FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING mapping INNER JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_FILE fileInfo ON mapping.REQUEST_NO = fileInfo.REQUEST_NO AND mapping.OBJECT_ID = fileInfo.OBJECT_ID WHERE mapping.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}
